content:
I live a large-ish city in a state run by a conservative administration, and the state likes to pass laws that many people in the city would disagree with, and you can’t just ignore states laws. However, you can direct your law enforcement to make enforcing those particular laws their lowest priority, effectively reducing their impact. This petition is an attempt to do just that for state laws targeting trans people specifically.

The tradeoff here is that this isn’t a direct ballot measure. The petition only has the power to force the city council to put it on their agenda, but they can still choose to make it worse or just not pass it.

So wish us luck both getting the signatures and hoping it goes well in city council.
